findings.message: Cesium tile crash detection is async in some plugin versions; full tile collision cooking causes LOD hitches. Hybrid analytic height query recommended for MVP; full mesh collision deferred to v2.1.
Per-frame budget is tight: Cesium tile streaming (7-9ms) + Lumen (2-4ms) + cannon + FX leaves <1ms headroom at worst case on RTX 3060. Must measure in Week 1 before any optimization planning.
Solo operator with no prior UE5 experience: Week 1 is the critical gate. UE5+Cesium setup (shader compile, Enhanced Input config, GeoReference, plugin pin) blocks all downstream mechanics.
Screenshot-diff CI harness (AC-V2-06) and Linux binary (AC-V2-09) are unlikely to fit in 4 weeks. Recommend encoding CUT-1 and CUT-2 as conditional in SPEC per D17 if-slip rule.
Aircraft mesh for MVP: game-developer recommends UE5 primitive Static Mesh components (no external assets); game-designer may propose FBX/Quixel. Conflict C5 from discovery — synthesis must resolve.

All 6 MVP mechanics (flight, stall, crash, cannon, AA gun, HUD) are technically viable in UE5 5.4 Blueprint-first. Core flight constants from v1 config.js port verbatim (unit conversion: meters * 100 = centimeters).
JSBSim deferred per D4 (locked). Integration path documented for v2.1+: compile as static library via ThirdParty/JSBSim/JSBSim.Build.cs. Migration trigger: profiler shows >4ms headroom post-MVP.

OQ-07 answer: lock sky time-of-day via launch parameter mapping to DirectionalLight rotation + Sky Atmosphere sun pitch before first frame. OQ-11: procedural primitive mesh for MVP. OQ-12: in-editor UCesiumGlobeAnchorComponent placement stored in Data Asset.

decisions_required: Synthesis must encode CUT-1 (screenshot-diff harness) and CUT-2 (Linux binary) as conditional on D17 if-slip rule — operator must confirm before SPEC approval.

OQ-11 resolution: operator must choose between primitive procedural mesh (game-developer position) vs FBX/Quixel (potential game-designer position) for MVP aircraft. Decision impacts Week 1 setup time.
OQ-02: BP-to-C++ migration trigger must be defined as a concrete profiler threshold. game-developer proposes: >2ms Blueprint tick overhead per frame as measured in UE5 Profiler Blueprint tab.
D17 if-slip rule exact wording: product-engineer must propose; operator must approve before SPEC is locked.
